comment: Review-surface validation generated by Codex after the MSVV dashboard curation pass.
reason: Current dashboard rows are paper-facing definitions, named statements, explicit source-condition rows, or documented boundary rows; premise provenance is audited separately.

removed_items.paperAssignment_query_choice: Generic option-shape support row; assignment use is covered by spend/revenue/feasibility formulas.
removed_items.paperInstance_has_budget_and_bid: Trivial structure-field support row; paper-facing formulas expose budgets and bids directly.
removed_items.section6_effective_bids_theorem8_finite_: Broad proof-adapter reduction; concrete Section 6 source extensions remain.
removed_items.section6_multiple_slots_distinct_choice_: Implementation invariant for the slot-expanded route, not a final paper-facing result.
removed_items.section6_multiple_slots_theorem8_finite_: Slot-expanded proof route; source-shaped page-level multiple-slot endpoint remains.
removed_items.section8_weighted_bids_theorem8_finite_e: Sufficient-condition variant; direct weighted-small-bids Section 8 endpoint remains.
removed_items.theorem8_finite_explicit_error: Finite proof-support endpoint; the paper-facing Theorem 8 limit endpoint remains.
removed_items.theorem9FeasiblePrefixRuleFamily_fields: Broad observed-prefix support model; final randomized-online endpoint remains.
removed_items.theorem9IntegralPrefixAlgorithm_choice_f: Concrete algorithm-model support row; final randomized-online endpoint remains.
removed_items.theorem9RandomizedOnlineAlgorithm_pmf: Type-shape support row; final randomized-online endpoint remains.
removed_items.theorem9_no_randomized_feasible_prefix_r: Broad support endpoint; paper-facing randomized-online endpoint remains.
removed_items.theorem9_no_randomized_integral_prefix_a: Intermediate specialization; paper-facing randomized-online endpoint remains.
